note: Source of truth for the quickfire index. Add an artifact = add an entry here. type/subjects/status must come from the controlled vocabulary below; adding a new vocab term is a deliberate edit, not an ad-hoc tag. status: active=shown at rest, archived=hidden until 'Show all', hidden=dev/junk kept out of the default view (still reachable via Show all). reviewed:false = auto-surfaced folder with inferred tags, needs a human pass.
